The swimmers who finished in at least 43 seconds are Arnost Petracek with a time of 43.12, Ronystony Cordeiro da Silva with a time of 44.22, and Grant Patterson with a time of 55.49. Step 3 incorrectly interprets the results by mistakenly excluding Arnulfo Castorena. The question asks for swimmers who finished in at least 43 seconds, and 1:03.49 is indeed over 43 seconds. Therefore, there are 4 swimmers (Arnost Petracek, Ronystony Cordeiro da Silva, Grant Patterson, and Arnulfo Castorena) who finished in at least 43 seconds. Step 3 is incorrect.
